description: Letter from Hillel b. Yeshuʿa he-ḥaver the cantor, Tiberias, to Shela/Sahlān b. Avraham he-ḥaver, Fusṭāṭ, regarding help for the leper community in Tiberias. Dating (Gil): late 1034 CE. See also Goitein's index card. DK 123 has changed shelfmark, and it will take some work to find the new one. Possibly DK M69, which is not available on FGP. There is another copy of this letter: L-G Misc. 25 (PGPID 2300).
tags: Tiberias lepers, 11th c, illness letter 969-1517, Tiberias, Illness
description_he: מכתב מהלל בן ישועה החבר החזן, טבריה, לשחלאן בן אברהם החבר, פוסטאט, בעניין עזרה לקהילת המצורעים בטבריה, סוף 1034.
